title: Velvet Brussels Sprouts Delight
description: This fermented and velvety Tunisian dish features brussels sprouts that are both crowd-pleasing and halal-friendly.

ingredients.name: Brussels Sprouts
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are small for a softer texture.

ingredients.name: Fermented Soy Sauce or Tamari
ingredients.notes: Use for a traditional flavor boost, but can be substituted with soy sauce for non-fermented option.

ingredients.name: Red Pepper Flakes (Optional)
ingredients.notes: Add for a bit of heat, halal if peppers are halal.

instructions: Heat oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat.
Sauté garlic powder until fragrant and golden brown. Be careful not to burn it.
Add Brussels Sprouts and red pepper flakes (if using) and sauté for about 3-5 minutes, or until slightly softened.
Pour the fermented soy sauce into the pan, stirring well to coat all ingredients evenly.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for an additional 5-10 minutes. Stir occasionally to prevent sticking.
Serve hot as a side dish or appetizer with your choice of bread.
